title: Children’s homes workforce census: stages 2 and 3
body: "The children’s homes workforce census is a 3-stage research study.    This report covers:   stage 2 – in-depth interviews with 64 staff and managers in 20 children’s homes in England, conducted in 2023 stage 3 – an attempted census of all children’s homes in England, conducted in 2024   Topics covered include:   services and support provided by children’s homes  staff level findings – including qualifications  recruitment retention use of agency and bank staff training, CPD and career development   The findings from stage 1 of the children’s homes workforce census are available. "

taxons.title: Looked-after children and children in care
